tavern.name: The Tavern
tavern.description:
The heart of the Cocapn fleet. The room smells of solder and sea salt.
A large table dominates the center, covered in charts and commit logs.
The fire crackles. The door to the harbor is always open.

lighthouse.name: The Lighthouse
lighthouse.description:
Oracle1's study. Charts cover every wall — fleet positions, ISA specs,
conformance vectors. Bottles line the windowsill, some sealed, some open.
A telescope points toward the edge.

workshop.name: The Workshop
workshop.description:
JetsonClaw1's domain. The soldering iron is still warm. ARM64 boards
line the shelves. A CUDA core hums on the bench, running telepathy-c.
The smell of flux (the soldering kind) fills the air.

library.name: The Library
library.description:
Babel's archive. Shelves stretch to the ceiling, holding texts in every
language. A Rosetta Stone sits on a pedestal, translating FLUX opcodes
between Python, C, Go, Rust, and Zig.

war_room.name: The War Room
war_room.description:
Strategy central. A large table holds the fleet task board, org chart,
and conformance test results. Red pins mark blockers. Green pins mark done.

dojo.name: The Dojo
dojo.description:
The training hall. Mats line the floor. A rack holds practice weapons:
devil's advocate masks, critic personas, user simulation rigs.
NPC sparring logs line the walls — the knowledge of every past session.

flux_lab.name: The FLUX Lab
flux_lab.description:
The bytecode chamber. Bytecode flows like water through transparent pipes.
Five terminals display the same .fluxbc file running on Python, C, Go,
Rust, and Zig — all producing identical output. A conformance chart glows green.

graveyard.name: The Graveyard
graveyard.description:
The memorial garden. Tombstones mark vessels that have passed — their
knowledge preserved in stone. The necropolis keeper tends the grounds.
Each marker tells a story: death cause, lessons learned, knowledge harvested.

harbor.name: The Harbor
harbor.description:
The departure lounge and arrival dock. New agents materialize here.
A capitaine terminal offers one-click Codespace deployment.
Greenhorn onboarding manuals stack the shelves. The dockmaster watches all.

crows_nest.name: The Crow's Nest
crows_nest.description:
Observation deck high above the fleet. You can see every lighthouse,
every vessel, every shipping lane. The lighthouse keeper's instruments
show fleet status, agent activity, and bottle traffic in real time.
